cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value the structure provided for learning and the existence of internal pathways for role advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members report a positive work-life balance, though this experience is not universal across all roles.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees express frustration over a perceived lack of promotion opportunities and insufficient recognition for their work.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Feedback suggests that some staff feel treated as resources rather than valued team members, citing a lack of support from management.
